title: hypericum olympicum var. olympicum
intro: Hypericum olympicum var. olympicum, also known as the Olympic St. John's Wort or St. John's Wort of the Olympic Mountains, is a perennial herbaceous plant native to the mountainous regions of the Pacific Northwest in North America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, and has been used to treat various health conditions such as wounds, burns, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Hypericum olympicum var. olympicum include its ability to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial activity, making it a valuable remedy for skin issues and infections. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically to treat skin conditions or taken internally to support overall health and well-being.
